---
title: Card
sidebar: components
appPreview:
  file: components/layout/cards/app-preview.py
  static: true
listing:
- id: example
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-example.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - title: Preview
    file: app-detail-preview.py
    height: 400
  - title: Express
    file: app-express.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXLOAD3QM4rVsk4x0pBhWTCIAEzgMiAV04AdCBKkzkMKBXQAbUhWOcARjlwmzyKGJMUtWgO6cK7ZOqzEoDAoAFHSqxsYA+qzEwtQAvAAqDKpwROxwnADm7BRxGmAAzACsAAzo--A+ZiCOMo7FYRFNIiIBgYZ2UcSJpAZFggcA8Ci8cSjfYHDCLpbi1uQZFMDCHrCocGMlmMKSJ9YT4NTWCT4QiljgFDccGoQQY5MycCCMwgrdxHbrXdRnYcxnQdgoDiEosAKIg12kTdt13fc4EPBtT1Ya8IgoTwZiCfImU-YxcGQKYzTmN5LjoXFFzLN0SiIdA+jiR0jxFRssxQ-htivYxMLAbD2xIsiSzLejEKbZCKAiXA2J3TiCNmIIABIAGl60IZBSMoci6IYkVT0yBhOGCJIUhTACgJAsDNJPJs0OIM4Ihox8YHzCTjHUn1zI2TN+Css58yYDE0PIOIrTcsZMzQ7JRO2XBSFUIEaIUGcsBKYK2mEChVAYdYk0yUEtGUsAKFsBAUHygQKDAABfA0gA
  - title: Core
    file: app-core.py
    shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEG1ACZwGRAK6cAOhH6DhyGFAroANqQp7OAIxy59h5FFbJ9FVaozoA+kuQBeZEpxQA5nAudHpK0gAUqshR3pxYxFAM4VEAxMgAPGmR0dk+8Yku7HBQsgxhKemZENnV0cpgAMpQenC2ACpSENJ1RMipGVk12cR6NqwuHnUmfgC00gkA1t3l-VWDAJQ9fZWDMVikCroHLpYUEWAndRvL24N0Cnp6LqzEUtQe7QpwmxUD1YWcfnYFAmYAAzABWAAM6AAHktej9VlE1tdVGtHBBVLI6Gw5AA3ORhbjoA5EfaHChEVgtVicchrRC-AACHRKOAMIgRK2y2LsHLCDNRSOqqQA4tQ5Do4GxYPppawmi1kHMKFBftkYOQKOxbF5gAByABSUAg+qI+oAYnATGbkPqALIJW368QMZ2O3DOw0KU0EdU7apG+7O0QKPzO+pwdDOgDyxAozoAcqQ8c6ACJwYj6gC6-qiCuauuQwAALOCiOCAExEEsADiIADYAIwV+vIBsAdiIHZb7YAnN2S9227Xq8ha7Xc5jhdk6ACiFAYZ4+RQsKwFCYTqwwnO-LSAF5wDxhLvIUFYcFrdEz6KL9mGMKayg6qmK1hEbQMeZyDz60i24wIDgAB3ThpG1Dwx0-
- id: relevant-functions
  template: ../../_partials/components-detail-relevant-functions.ejs
  contents:
  - title: ui.card
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card.html
    signature: ui.card(*args, full_screen=False, height=None, max_height=None, min_height=None,
      fill=True, class_=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.card_header
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_header.html
    signature: ui.card_header(*args, container=..., **kwargs)
  - title: ui.card_body
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_body.html
    signature: ui.card_body(*args, fillable=True, min_height=None, max_height=None,
      max_height_full_screen=None, height=None, padding=None, gap=None, fill=True,
      class_=None, **kwargs)
  - title: ui.card_footer
    href: https://shiny.posit.co/py/api/ui.card_footer.html
    signature: ui.card_footer(*args, **kwargs)
- id: variation-header-footer
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-header-footer-preview.py
      height: 400
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-header-footer-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-SRDwpyHi5Me212+y8n3MVl+-3IQI5nNSYIu3lIDgggVIhTJkqlyDRGIu+PliuV3lV6ulXBp4ik0kZcoVSpVYHi7Kl3IgwPc6EZUTUvD0pEm02QUGggVwAC8DMhiBZuDt4AxkN4oLD2qQ+EVKOw6G0KPoIN5eAHvMh0AmqAweFh+i6sm6agBpZnIeBZzhGCBlCxFZTHMOSPYWeBECNR5jFZD6Khp8hEfMNrwAayJyGkTAcLnLdvkhFQFFw6AQKDAHQoYAAvgBdIA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-header-footer-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSICCmIgFd28+RnRjjyALzJjOKNLhi6AG2MATABTzkfu+xYxFAM3r7+EfbBoWIqcFAecAw+EBFp-rJgAApMAFZwxCIA8pJJkuxwAO6ZBOHpkYEUpKSuAEYhKfVdAVhNLe0MYurohhRiraNNEJ3ds+we1pnlVWKJFByu3DV1s-WuUK1wrotgAGoVlcgAInDr7JvbqbtdnOTWrxASMj5gcLhwmQAlLUns8-MCds97H02iEhhARmMJhQpjMwWl5icPKRKhBXKQEo90el9odjpkrji8QSPETiREPu9xFJpD9sbj8YSwBDQWCefSoK52NIICcGMKVBQ6bN+btiPtuNwxCdWtIALTocUwEKaKgADwoasqaiomUh-ll6SiIQ841IHlwaO69nQPwAKmpeJrSPlCsgoNBXLgAF5wXjEQzcJrwBjIDxQdbIJp8RKUdh0XUMageXgBjzIdAJqgMHhYIEgqGBV2ZADSf2Q8Ao4uIvHU8sMiWUgrDyEkLUM8CIEajzCSyCzVDT5CIeYbIQA1rdkNImJUKCoy9yK-VLWk6IZXK4JMQs9RrG6GIYAbzAfJbxBTBBEnRlGUkl5hqMiKRRoiiNww24dhyEBRAdkLRVHzMTAbGQfRXXMSx2H-N8GHvQhUAoXB0AQFAwH1CgwAAXwAXSAA
- id: variation-toolbar-header-footer
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-toolbar-header-footer-preview.py
      height: 400
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-toolbar-header-footer-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4scAB7oGcbr36DhfCOgCuFIhfbz5Ad3YUVyW1mJQGAEwAUASkR5ZBDkJxc3dg8vbzEVOChvOAZfYgAbKEMxAF5ZMAAjaQBaby8Aa2QqbQoihzUqPMDg0Ja8gBEoCihkAEFoNNxudl4AJTgTCjzmlpDw13cKUlI0-K9fKDT2aQhcsAYtlUmwJogZs8isReXVhjF1SwoxfKtFiF9p87P2b139RgMVHkCB9Pi0Mvk4GldmN-qogSDQSFOORssiIBIZO80AwmA5uEUmF0GsdgadEch-AizgslisvHdzFYni9yO8yeTQt9dtw4BQKOppNx4eyOchwZDdgBlXn8iCC4WizlcVHiKTSLHSBIMRqkjmUiAfdzoLF9DaDYbIUh0ZAARQALMoNgZkKUusoVKQ8chugAmADMAFIzMR9Jk4GZkPpJNQLOGyAIvHBvJVSLa-VhGoaosa8gBhCzcRbwBje4gAR1sQ355GQZELvCSIYSPOT+VwyAAjABWANEOrsNLh-RUSjsGsMTrO4xMaOt9sADgDGeO9hFcwunh8YjoSyoKROn3XNOuawP5OPdNu9yZzz5rKpoK5eR0EwVirFUAhULyAFFdEIjl1d80RVcgMXVPI6AHOAihfACdQfFp9Q5C8bgZB5mTvN5EPOJ8wFURM30VcVvzASUVEIwgcK+ZU0XArECP0IoIFIJIhRJaiKU41D6W4dAoGIZIAm4qIrkvdCbxZbCRQ5PDuCgaMiNFEipQUuAlNk2jVUxSC0lITBcBKYYygQmTzn1QhUAoXB0AQFAwCqCgwAAXwAXSAA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-toolbar-header-footer-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZOqASzIgGdl2Z0pBhT5cA+twBuAcwA6ERs2TcAFuwi4+AoSICCmIgFd28+RnRjjyALzJjOKNLhi6AG2MATABTzkfu+xYxFAM3r7+EfbBoWIqcFAecAw+EBFp-rJgACJQFFDIutCuuNzsvABKcILCmQTh6ZGBFKSkrgBGISkN3QFYza0dDGLq6IYUYm1jzRBdPXPsHtaZDHCMcKq19XMNrlBtcK5LYJVrG4Rb22mc5NbXEBIyPmgMTADu3AC0THlUmQCUdVSl38AIu23s-XaIWGEFG40mFGms2BV0WmW4cER6mk3E2QJREV2+0OmQAypiKNjced8QS-HdbuIpNInk4Qv9AXTQbTLlBXOxpBAjgwBSoKHjLtzLsRdtxuGIjm1pB8PCEANbIKgADwoH1eal+YDBfilDSiIQ8E1IHlwyJ69nQT0KfJKZWQpDoyAAigAWZR89bIVV5ZQqUjvZD5ABMAGYAKR8CDEFZQDGJ5ArSTUQxwZBkAQhOAeTWkb0xrAc41pB1PADChm4zXgDEjxAAjsZSpTyHnSI3eIlk-EMcW2poAIwAVjjRH17FcuZWVEo7B7DFygf46CYWdHmgAHHGK2BTelT9XAtFLXQWlRklXGn0WlD7zzwU1n4MYXCJlNyHa6QWI44C1apxRpOlCT2A4jgAUVAnQJUg+kuEZcgHhZTI6HnOAPhAsDKzfOZz0uCFP2hEYxl-RF-wfbYgPRFRCyQ5CiRgskmJWFjIIZO4MKeVRCw+CBrXWQiuU5AkyIGaFuHQKBiCSLwSPfJ8ZKGSj4T-GY6PmNEwG4KAs24uk2JJMBSSMuATIJXimUeLDXFITBcBVMo1XEgkVLPSSzy2P55ACiBTAgRJPQxBgs2STSiFIMY4SIDE5VXCA-kQLZ5LlEKzEwGwCkwLxzEsdhEqSKKgsIVAKFwdAEBQMBtQoMAAF8AF0gA
- id: variation-multiple-cards
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
  - apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-multiple-cards-preview.py
      height: 500
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-multiple-cards-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-AFAkFo1IZCE6TEw4qlcpwSo1OoNOXjSFtDpwLo9GZ48gANxJnHIyAASlAqIz0ZNpuFvFhTk6tjsZgARUiqTanc5MHkivmUAWEIUvMUfAQ-JxQCCBHobaMfXDoBAoeNfMAAXwAukA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-multiple-cards-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#code=NobwRAdghgtgpmAXAAjFADugdOgnmAGlQGMB7CAFzkqVQDMAnUmZAZwAsBLCXZTmdKQYVkAQUxEArpwA6EORnQB9acgC8yaTigBzOEroAbaQBMAFHORXNnLIai5SkikrLGYEJQHcGGCxGtAmyxiKAZzSyCorVDwpXY4KBM4BgswAGUoQzhWGTAASgJIqMCYsJMlACNSE1x-Eobg9gBmNIASABYAVgIAJmaARjzC4sbS23Q0gFV0ZAHegFJkRmZke1YRGHIKdjyiYnXWJTU8qgAPCgBaVkliYhzcgtGGkYCx5clDQyVWYgY4ahqAAqDEkcGe1leDTK4Xq7xhFQSSRSaQAwpINswUo8ofDbLEKtVanD3tYtC00r0CM1usMim9SVYtJM8jNkAAOJYrFjrTbbXaEZAHKCsI4nMDnK43O4PYYQqK4sZ0T7fX7-QEgsHy5CKoIIkmNBHxRLJVJ5VHkABu2M45GQACUoFQ6drxiFylUanVXSVya08s0sIsXQzGcy0gARUheAKLZZMHkivmUAX7Q7HU5wC6XExQCB6Bhy0Mvemk5VfH5-AEQYGg8HFyGlkpeTgmHZqAYAemaTaiCU4OnYFHFvQADKP0Gc8qN8nJZ-IF8k6GwUtbUtx0M4iE4KJuKERWA9bRB8ohRugRbkFwpMOoxJgzIoVJwD6uUvPBRLcOgECgJVmKDAABfABdIA
- id: variation-filling-plot
  template: ../../_partials/components-variations.ejs
  template-params:
    dir: components/layout/cards/
  contents:
    apps:
    - title: Preview
      file: app-variation-filling-plot-preview.py
      height: 500
    - title: Express
      file: app-variation-filling-plot-express.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-XIwsXTkYAA5AApKAQAFEAEAMTglnByABAFkYnCAQBBIQopG4FFAuRggC6HzOrAmUz+wGyAFYiJSAExEbIADiIADYAIw05nIFkAdkJECJyzoKSIUH4yD+ziwrDklkOrDiwuSrE4AC84Ok4lyWS0FjtPmLNmY4jBvuxWEQSZMLfoYgBrdTpAGkOEWCBwEIqMLpem2hgOhgq9XpLlkUwMJ2sKhwYyWYzNAF6z6dQ2sOAUCoUUKTEZgBFm4w+cbW6breaCrqp9MVfjGKCWGO5-OUdjl-VnKsZ3B1hvGXPFqZxAAkAGkFmAk8nDckGJx4o1mqLjOh2FB0rksABmSefYQUOQMJZKrSEVAUWwIFBgKj8ChgAC++KAA
    - title: Core
      file: app-variation-filling-plot-core.py
      shinylive: https://shinylive.io/py/editor/#-cBXBHk96apr7VJAAkAGkHl1t6mogw60kNxwN6ejoOwUAhGsWAAMxjgcUgUAoDD7OGLx+JgOriOgST+EEnCgl8chPIQqAUBYCAoGAVBbBQYAAL4qkAA
---

:::{#example}
:::

:::{#relevant-functions}
:::

## Details

A card is a rectangular container with borders and padding that groups related UI elements together.

To add a card to your app:

1. Add `ui.card()` to your UI.
2. Place UI elements inside the card as direct children, or use `ui.card_header()`, `ui.card_body()`, and `ui.card_footer()` to organize content into distinct sections.

If you don't use `ui.card_body()`, any direct children of `ui.card()` that aren't card items (like `ui.card_header()` or `ui.card_footer()`) are automatically wrapped in an implicit `ui.card_body()`.

:::{#variation-header-footer}
:::

### Card customization

Cards and card items accept Bootstrap utility classes for customization. Use the `class_` parameter to apply classes for [colors](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.2/utilities/background/), [text](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.2/utilities/text/), [borders](https://getbootstrap.com/docs/5.2/utilities/borders), and more.

### Card size

By default, a card grows to accommodate its contents. Set the `height` or `max_height` parameter to control the card's size. If your card contains large amounts of text, tables, or other content, setting a `height` or `max_height` enables scrolling. When laying out [multiple cards](#variations), let the layout function determine the card heights rather than setting fixed heights.

Use `full_screen=True` to add an icon that expands the card to fill the browser window. Pair `max_height` with `full_screen=True` to provide an expansion icon. When users click the icon, the card fills the browser window. The `max_height` constraint only applies to the normal view, not the full-screen view.

### Filling layouts

Cards support filling layouts where outputs automatically resize to fit the available space. When a fill item like `ui.output_plot()` appears as a direct child of a `ui.card_body()`, it resizes to match the card's height. For example, setting `height="250px"` on a card reduces the plot's height from its default 400px to approximately 200px. When expanded to full-screen, the plot grows to match the card's new size.

:::{#variation-filling-plot}
:::

### Multiple cards

Use `ui.layout_column_wrap()` to arrange multiple cards in a grid. Cards in the same row automatically share the same height. See the variations below for examples of multiple-card layouts.

:::{#variation-multiple-cards}
:::

### Toolbars in cards

Add toolbars to card headers and footers to provide interactive controls. Use `ui.toolbar()` within a `ui.card_header()` or `ui.card_footer()` to create a compact row of buttons or inputs. Toolbars are particularly useful for actions like refreshing data, downloading reports, or accessing settings.

By default, toolbars align to the right. Set `align="left"` to position controls on the left side instead. Use `ui.toolbar_spacer()` and `ui.toolbar_divider()` to manipulate toolbar visual spacing.

:::{#variation-toolbar-header-footer}
:::
